questions.question: Which Azure AI Vision feature extracts printed and handwritten text from images?
questions.explanation: The Read API performs OCR to extract text from images and documents.

questions.question: Which Azure Speech feature converts spoken audio into text?
questions.explanation: Speech-to-Text converts spoken audio into written text.

questions.question: Which technique retrieves relevant documents and provides them as context to an LLM?
questions.explanation: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) retrieves external knowledge and injects it into prompts.

questions.question: Which Azure service provides prebuilt AI APIs for vision, speech, and language tasks?
questions.explanation: Azure Cognitive Services (Azure AI Services) provide prebuilt APIs for vision, speech, language, and decision tasks.

questions.question: Which technique retrieves relevant documents and provides them as context to an LLM?
questions.explanation: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) retrieves external knowledge and injects it into prompts.

questions.question: Which Azure AI Language feature identifies positive, negative, or neutral sentiment in text?
questions.explanation: Sentiment Analysis determines whether text sentiment is positive, neutral, or negative.

questions.explanation: The Read API performs OCR to extract text from images and documents.

questions.explanation: Managed Identity allows Azure resources to authenticate without storing credentials in code.

questions.explanation: Azure Document Intelligence extracts structured fields, tables, and key-value pairs from documents.

questions.question: Which Azure Speech feature converts spoken audio into text?
questions.explanation: Speech-to-Text converts spoken audio into written text.

questions.question: Which Azure service provides enterprise search with AI enrichment capabilities?
questions.explanation: Azure AI Search indexes data and enriches it using AI skillsets such as OCR, entity recognition, and key phrase extraction.

questions.question: Which technique retrieves relevant documents and provides them as context to an LLM?
questions.explanation: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) retrieves external knowledge and injects it into prompts.

questions.question: Which Azure feature allows secure authentication to Azure services without storing credentials in code?
questions.explanation: Managed Identity allows Azure resources to authenticate without storing credentials in code.

questions.question: Which Azure AI Language feature identifies positive, negative, or neutral sentiment in text?
questions.explanation: Sentiment Analysis determines whether text sentiment is positive, neutral, or negative.

questions.question: Which Azure Speech feature converts spoken audio into text?
questions.explanation: Speech-to-Text converts spoken audio into written text.

questions.question: Which Azure service extracts structured information from documents such as invoices and receipts?
questions.explanation: Azure Document Intelligence extracts structured fields, tables, and key-value pairs from documents.

questions.question: Which Azure AI Vision feature extracts printed and handwritten text from images?
questions.explanation: The Read API performs OCR to extract text from images and documents.

questions.question: What does the temperature parameter control in Azure OpenAI models?
questions.explanation: Temperature controls randomness. Lower values make outputs deterministic while higher values increase creativity.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of embeddings in Azure OpenAI?
questions.explanation: Embeddings convert text into numerical vector representations for similarity search and semantic retrieval.
